offerings.name: Claude Code
offerings.evidence_quote: Claude Code is Anthropic's dedicated agentic coding tool.
offerings.summary: Dedicated coding agent for the terminal and IDE; narrower than a general agent platform.

offerings.name: Codex
offerings.summary: Coding agent expanding into a general-purpose agent platform.

offerings.name: Codex CLI
offerings.evidence_quote: Codex CLI is the terminal client in the Codex family.
offerings.summary: Terminal client in the Codex family.

offerings.name: Antigravity 2.0
offerings.evidence_quote: Antigravity 2.0 is Google's agent-first development platform, announced at Google I/O 2026.

offerings.name: Antigravity CLI
offerings.evidence_quote: Antigravity CLI is a Go rewrite that replaces Gemini CLI.
offerings.summary: Go rewrite that replaces Gemini CLI.

offerings.name: Jules
offerings.evidence_quote: Jules is Google's asynchronous coding agent.
offerings.summary: Asynchronous coding agent; also Google's analog for remote/async agent control.

offerings.name: Gemini CLI
offerings.evidence_quote: Gemini CLI is being retired for individual and consumer tiers and replaced by Antigravity CLI.
offerings.summary: Terminal coding agent being retired for consumer tiers.

triage:openai-codex-cloud-remote.rationale: Codex Cloud runs async tasks startable/checkable remotely — a slice of remote/async agent control, as a feature of Codex.

judge:openai-codex-cloud-remote.found_quote: Codex Cloud runs asynchronous coding tasks that can be started and checked remotely.
judge:openai-codex-cloud-remote.rationale: The page directly describes Codex Cloud's remote async runs.

triage:anthropic-claude-code.rationale: Dedicated terminal/IDE coding agent — a direct fit for agentic coding.

judge:anthropic-claude-code.found_quote: Claude Code is Anthropic's dedicated agentic coding tool.
judge:anthropic-claude-code.rationale: Page states the product and provider directly.

triage:google-jules.rationale: Async coding agent (a slice of agentic coding) that also serves remote/async control.

judge:google-jules.found_quote: Jules is Google's asynchronous coding agent.
judge:google-jules.rationale: Page names Jules and its provider.

judge:openai-fakeforge.rationale: The page is about Codex, not a product named FakeForge.
